questionHtml:
Which is correct?

A.  Electrophiles are Brønsted–Lowry acids.

B.  Nucleophiles are Brønsted–Lowry acids.

C.  Electrophiles are Lewis acids.

D.  Nucleophiles are Lewis acids.

meta.title: Which is correct? A. Electrophiles are Brønsted–Lowry acids. B. Nucleophiles are Brønsted–Lowry acids. C. Electrophiles are Lewis acids. D. Nucleophiles are Lewis acids.
